---
name: Bug Report
about: Report something that is broken or not working as expected
title: "[BUG] <short description>"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Tool

Which tool is affected? (e.g. `ascii-tree-generator`)

> 

## Tool Version

Check the tool's `CHANGELOG.md` for the current version.

> e.g. v1.0.0

## Browser

> e.g. Chrome 124, Firefox 125, Edge 124

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

> 

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open `...`
2. Enter input `...`
3. Click / select `...`
4. Observe `...`

## Expected Behaviour

What did you expect to happen?

> 

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened?

> 

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (e.g. only happens with a specific input, only in a specific browser).

>
